title: [Nyessem, Ring Loop Entrance]
description: Meticulously carved from pearlescent white stone, the walls here suggest the area was hollowed and then detailed to accent the stone's innate glow.  Shapes of jewel-studded flowers, animals, and geometric patterns have all been artistically etched into the walls.  In particular, a wide gem and stone relief of two individuals holding orbs stands out, dominating a prominent section opposite a tall sapphire-lined tunnel.  Beneath the relief and from alongside the installation, a marble fountain flows liberally into a shallow marble pool.  In the room's middle, a wood and stone sign covered in metal letters offers instructions.
